response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership in agentic AI or fintech. His background in event-driven systems and real-time data aligns partially with the role, though his experience does not clearly meet the hard requirements for CTO-level responsibilities in regulated fintech environments.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Sociomantic).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Diverse technical leadership in scaling engineering teams and tooling (e.g., Altom Consulting, Optilyz).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) in high-growth scale-ups.
Limited evidence of production multi-agent AI systems in regulated or fintech contexts.
Fintech infrastructure familiarity (e.g., credit systems, payment flows) is not clearly demonstrated.
